Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; paths=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['paths']; [print\(m.upper\(\), p\) for p,methods in sorted\(paths.items\(\)\) for m in methods if m != 'options']")
Bash(docker exec leadscrapper-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d leadscrapper -c ' *)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(x['website_status'] for x in d\); print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)} | NO_WEBSITE={c[\\"NO_WEBSITE\\"]} FACEBOOK={c[\\"FACEBOOK_ONLY\\"]} FREE_BUILDER={c[\\"FREE_BUILDER\\"]} HAS_WEBSITE={c[\\"HAS_WEBSITE\\"]}'\)")

PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"country":"United Kingdom","city":"London","category":"Plumber","provider":"google_maps","radius_km":0}'; $c = $r1 | Group-Object website_status | Select-Object Name, Count; Write-Host "Test 1 — London / Plumber"; Write-Host "Total:" $r1.Count; $c | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"country":"United Kingdom","city":"Manchester","category":"Builder","provider":"google_maps","radius_km":0}'; $c = $r2 | Group-Object website_status | Select-Object Name, Count; Write-Host "Test 2 — Manchester / Builder"; Write-Host "Total:" $r2.Count; $c | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r3 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"country":"Bulgaria","city":"Sofia","category":"Plumber","provider":"google_maps","radius_km":0}'; $c = $r3 | Group-Object website_status | Select-Object Name, Count; Write-Host "Test 3 — Sofia / Plumber \(Bulgaria\)"; Write-Host "Total:" $r3.Count; $c | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r4 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"country":"Bulgaria","city":"Varna","category":"Hair Salon","provider":"google_maps","radius_km":0}'; $c = $r4 | Group-Object website_status | Select-Object Name, Count; Write-Host "Test 4 — Varna / Hair Salon \(Bulgaria\)"; Write-Host "Total:" $r4.Count; $c | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"country":"United Kingdom","city":"London","category":"Plumber","provider":"yell","radius_km":0,"expand_neighbors":false,"expand_keywords":false}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "keys: $\($json | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name\)"; Write-Output "leads is array: $\($json.leads -is [System.Array]\)"; Write-Output "leads count: $\($json.leads.Count\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"country":"United Kingdom","city":"London","category":"Plumber","provider":"google_maps","radius_km":0,"expand_neighbors":false,"expand_keywords":false}'; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/search" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Response keys: $\($json | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name\)"; Write-Output "leads is array: $\($json.leads -is [System.Array]\)"; Write-Output "leads count: $\($json.leads.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($markets = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/businesses/analytics/markets" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $cats = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/businesses/analytics/categories" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $rev = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/businesses/analytics/revenue-by-month" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "markets is array: $\($markets -is [System.Array]\), count: $\($markets.Count\)"; Write-Output "categories is array: $\($cats -is [System.Array]\), count: $\($cats.Count\)"; Write-Output "revenue is array: $\($rev -is [System.Array]\), count: $\($rev.Count\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $pages = @\("http://localhost:3000", "http://localhost:3000/leads", "http://localhost:3000/crm", "http://localhost:3000/opportunities", "http://localhost:3000/pipeline"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $code = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $p -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Output "$p -> $code" } catch { Write-Output "$p -> ERROR: $_" } })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); a=d['analytics']; print\(f'kw={len\(a[\\"keywords_used\\"]\)} raw={a[\\"raw_count\\"]} deduped={a[\\"deduped_count\\"]}'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/leads/1" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "CloudTalk|via CloudTalk" | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($endpoints = @\("/businesses/stats", "/businesses", "/cloudtalk/status", "/cloudtalk/calls/1", "/health"\); foreach \($e in $endpoints\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000$e" -Method GET; Write-Output "$e -> OK" } catch { Write-Output "$e -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell($payload = @{ event = "call.finished"; call = @{ id = "test-123"; type = "OUTBOUND"; status = "ANSWERED"; duration = 90; start_time = "2026-06-25T10:00:00Z"; end_time = "2026-06-25T10:01:30Z" } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($payload\); $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/cloudtalk/webhook" -Method POST -Body $bytes -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8"; $r | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://developers.cloudtalk.io/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $callsCreate = $json.paths."/calls/create.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $callsIndex = $json.paths."/calls/index.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $callsShow = $json.paths."/calls/{callId}" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Write-Output "=== /calls/create.json ==="; Write-Output $callsCreate; Write-Output "=== /calls/index.json ==="; Write-Output $callsIndex; Write-Output "=== /calls/{callId} ==="; Write-Output $callsShow)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://developers.cloudtalk.io/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $contactsIndex = $json.paths."/contacts/index.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $contactsAdd = $json.paths."/contacts/add.json".put.requestBody.content."application/json".schema | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; $recording = $json.paths."/calls/recording/{callId}.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $agentsIndex = $json.paths."/agents/index.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; Write-Output "=== CONTACTS INDEX ==="; $contactsIndex; Write-Output "=== CONTACTS ADD BODY ==="; $contactsAdd; Write-Output "=== RECORDING ==="; $recording; Write-Output "=== AGENTS INDEX ==="; $agentsIndex)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://developers.cloudtalk.io/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $contactNumArray = $json.components.schemas.ContactNumberArray | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; $contactNum = $json.components.schemas.ContactNumber | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; $contactShow = $json.paths."/contacts/show/{contactId}.json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; $servers = $json.servers | ConvertTo-Json; $securitySchemes = $json.components.securitySchemes | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; Write-Output "=== SERVERS ==="; $servers; Write-Output "=== SECURITY ==="; $securitySchemes; Write-Output "=== ContactNumberArray ==="; $contactNumArray; Write-Output "=== ContactNumber Schema ==="; $contactNum; Write-Output "=== /contacts/show ==="; $contactShow)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://developers.cloudtalk.io/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $contactsAddResp = $json.paths."/contacts/add.json".put.responses | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $contactsEditResp = $json.paths."/contacts/edit/{contactId}.json".post.requestBody.content."application/json".schema | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; Write-Output "=== CONTACTS ADD RESPONSE ==="; $contactsAddResp; Write-Output "=== CONTACTS EDIT BODY ==="; $contactsEditResp)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T backend python -c "from app.core.config import get_settings; s = get_settings\(\); print\(f'agent_id={s.cloudtalk_agent_id}'\)")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d leadcrm -c "\\dt search_campaigns" 2>&1)
